zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Tyrell於1095年出生在英國艾可藍加姆時，他的父親Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix35歲，母親Adelize FitzRichard de Clare28歲。他和Ade d' Aumale至少有1個兒子。他去世於1159年在英國哈普爾劍橋大學默里 科華士享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tyrrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Tyrell was born in 1095, in Langham, Essex, England, his father, Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix, was 35 and his mother, Adelize FitzRichard de Clare, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Ade d' Aumale. He died in 1159, in New Forest, Hampshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Tyrell est né en 1095, à Langham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelize FitzRichard de Clare, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ade d' Aumale. Il est décédé en 1159, à New Forest, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Er hatte mit Ade d' Aumale mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1159 im Alter von 64 Jahren in New Forest, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Tyrellが1095年にイギリスエセックスランガムで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poixは35歳，母Adelize FitzRichard de Clareは28歳であった。彼はAde d' Aumaleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1159年にイギリスハンプシュアイアニュー フォーエストで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Tyrell(이)가 1095년 영국 에세스 랭함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelize FitzRichard de Clare(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Ade d' Aumale(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1159년 영국 함프실르 뉴 포레스트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ade d' Aumale. Он умер в 1159 г. в местности ню форест, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.
